title: nepeta hispanica
intro: Nepeta hispanica, also known as Spanish catmint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Nepeta hispanica include its ability to relieve digestive issues, calm anxiety and insomnia, and soothe respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Nepeta hispanica can be used in herbal preparations like teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
